programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kelly and Robin need an expansion for their growing family.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single mom looks for a vacation getaway in Florida with enough room for her entire extended family to stay; she wants a Mediterranean home with a pool and all the amenities.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newly married couple is looking for a new home in Colorado; as a designer, she's bursting with creativity and dreams of gutting a fixer, but that conflicts with his plans of living in a low-maintenance new build.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott & Bryan work on adding value to the property, while the teams take on two small but critical spaces, the front entry and main bathroom. These high-traffic areas demand clever functionality and must make a stellar first impression. It's a designer showdown as Chalon & Tatianna both swing for the fences, Marcy finds herself stretched beyond her comfort zone, and Taylor's indecision explodes into a full-blown wallpaper fiasco!

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kelly and Robin need an expansion for their growing family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Heather and Ian are hanging on by a thread: with two kids under three who don't sleep, and the end of maternity leave around the corner, they are exhausted and living in a constant state of anxiety and frustration; they're so overrun with clutter that their deep soaker tub has become storage; Kortney and Kenny rescue the pair by creating child-safe storage solutions, a custom kitchen pantry to get organized, and a revamped basement with a tub used for baths, not storage.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: After hurriedly agreeing to purchase a spacious, two-story home in her husband's old neighborhood, a woman's misgivings about the house have caught up with her and she's ready for a change.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: A family is quickly outgrowing their small starter home; dad is determined to stay and looks to Jillian to help him finish the DIY projects he started; mom is hopeful Todd will find them a bigger home in a quieter neighborhood.

programme.sub-title: A Serendipitous Journey From Atlanta to Valencia

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Katie and Dalton don't have time to take on the renovation that their 100-year-old farmhouse desperately needs; an injury has kept Dalton from finishing projects.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Farm Is
programme.desc: As Brad and Andrea's five daughters move out one by one, the empty nesters find themselves looking for a smaller nest.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brad and Katie's farmhouse is the realization of a dream; they always planned to raise their three kids in a farmhouse but until now, they just hadn't found the one.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Marianne and Ron plan to leave the big city and make the move to a farmhouse where they can entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Hailey and Jason's farmhouse has been in Jason's family for three generations and now Jason and his family all call it home; despite the property's family history, there's nothing special about living in the farmhouse's cramped, neglected interior.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Ready vs. Reluctant in Espiritu Santo, Vanuatu
programme.desc: He plans to use the archipelago as a backdrop for his nature videos, but the lack of western amenities has her rethinking the move entirely.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Family Seeks Multigenerational Home in Costa Rica
programme.desc: A father-daughter team searches for a million-dollar multigenerational home on the jungle coast of Brasilito, Costa Rica; they have an extensive wish list in which an ocean view, a pool and separate guest quarters are all required.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Singing in the City, in Stockholm
programme.desc: After a health scare, a husband and wife look to fulfill their dream of living abroad in Stockholm, Sweden; he seeks the vibrancy of the city center, but space is hard to come by in town and she needs enough room to teach opera lessons from home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: NYC Woman Seeks Love in Amsterdam

programme.sub-title: Community Connection vs. Comfort in Tulum, Mexico

programme.sub-title: Recapturing the Excitement of Their Youth in La Drova, Spain

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Single Mom Finds Her Calm in Siem Reap, Cambodia

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott & Bryan work on adding value to the property, while the teams take on two small but critical spaces, the front entry and main bathroom. It's a designer showdown as Chalon & Tatianna both swing for the fences, Marcy finds herself stretched beyond her comfort zone, and Taylor's indecision explodes into a full-blown wallpaper fiasco!

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

programme.sub-title: Feeling the Squeeze in Seoul, South Korea
